expectedEffects.summary: Project should reopen as an Aurelia app.
Router should expose routed catalog facts after reopen.
Routed catalog router options should be visible after RouterConfiguration is registered.
Routed catalog router options should configure low-boilerplate active link styling.
Routed catalog state source should be visible in app topology.
Routed catalog state should expose composed state objects.
Routed catalog items collection should use plain getter observation.
Routed catalog service source should be visible in app topology.
App root should be visible after reopen.
Root component should be a custom element.
Root component stylesheet should be visible as a style resource.
Root component should use an external template.
Routed catalog list route config should be visible.
Routed catalog route config should be visible as a source-backed router product.
Routed catalog list route should target the main viewport.
Routed catalog Item list route should be a custom element.
Routed catalog route config should close as an authored decorator object.
Routed catalog nested route config should close as child route objects.
Routed catalog detail route pattern should expose itemId.
Routed catalog detail endpoint should carry itemId.
Routed catalog detail route-context read should align to itemId.
Routed catalog static detail link should recognize the concrete itemId.
Routed catalog cards should recognize data-driven detail links.
Routed catalog viewport instruction tree should carry the source query value.
Routed catalog viewport instruction tree should carry the route fragment.
Routed catalog root template should expose the main viewport.
Routed catalog Item card should be a custom element.
Routed catalog list should expose list-renderer component role.
Routed catalog list should bind local Item objects into a local card.
Routed catalog list should observe direct DI state items without VM forwarding getters.
Routed catalog list should expose native filter value target access.
Routed catalog list should expose native filter value channels.
Routed catalog list should expose native filter value data flow.
Routed catalog list should expose in-stock checked target access.
Routed catalog list should expose in-stock checked value channels.
Routed catalog list should expose in-stock checked data flow.
Routed catalog list should expose badge select option-list observer coupling.
Routed catalog list should expose debounce binding behavior for search.
Routed catalog list should observe direct DI state search filter reads.
Routed catalog list should materialize repeat template-controller hydration.
Routed catalog list should materialize repeat synthetic-view hydration.
Routed catalog list card target property should stay item.
Routed catalog availability switch owner template-controller row.
Routed catalog availability switch owner synthetic-view row.
Routed catalog availability case branch template-controller row.
Routed catalog availability case branch synthetic-view row.
Routed catalog availability default branch template-controller row.
Routed catalog availability default branch synthetic-view row.
Routed catalog storefront has package manifest tooling.
Routed catalog storefront has TypeScript project tooling.
Routed catalog storefront has local asset module declarations.
Routed catalog storefront has an app root.
Routed catalog storefront has root, list route, detail route, and card custom elements.
Routed catalog storefront has an app-root component role.
Routed catalog storefront has a routed-component role.
Routed catalog storefront has a component-composition host role.
Routed catalog storefront has an event-surface component role.
Routed catalog storefront has external templates.
Routed catalog storefront has compiled template facts.
Routed catalog storefront has runtime controller facts.
Routed catalog storefront has RouteContext topology products.
Routed catalog storefront has au-viewport products.
Routed catalog storefront has ViewportAgent products.
Routed catalog storefront has route-recognizer pattern products.
Routed catalog storefront has route-recognizer endpoint products.
Routed catalog storefront has route-recognizer state products.
Routed catalog storefront has TypedNavigationInstruction products.
Routed catalog storefront has ViewportInstruction products.
Routed catalog storefront has ViewportInstructionTree products.
Routed catalog storefront has RecognizedRoute products.
Routed catalog storefront recognizes the entity route parameter from static navigation.
Routed catalog storefront has RouteTree products.
Routed catalog storefront has RouteNode products.
Routed catalog storefront route node carries the concrete entity route parameter value.
Routed catalog storefront route node exposes child-first entity route parameters.
Routed catalog storefront route node exposes include-query source values.
Routed catalog storefront route node carries the main viewport.
Routed catalog storefront has ComponentAgent handoff products.
Routed catalog storefront has class interpolation target access.
Routed catalog storefront has class-token value channels.
Routed catalog storefront has class interpolation data flow.
Routed catalog storefront has style interpolation target access.
Routed catalog storefront has style-rule value channels.
Routed catalog storefront has style interpolation data flow.

Routed catalog storefront has class-toggle data flow.

Routed catalog storefront has style-property data flow.
Routed catalog storefront has conditional template-controller rows.
Routed catalog storefront has else template-controller rows.
Routed catalog storefront has catalog-status promise owner template-controller row.
Routed catalog storefront has catalog-status promise owner synthetic-view row.
Routed catalog storefront has catalog-status pending branch template-controller row.
Routed catalog storefront has catalog-status pending branch synthetic-view row.
Routed catalog storefront has catalog-status fulfilled branch template-controller row.
Routed catalog storefront has catalog-status fulfilled branch synthetic-view row.
Routed catalog storefront has catalog-status rejected branch template-controller row.
Routed catalog storefront has catalog-status rejected branch synthetic-view row.
Routed catalog storefront has truthiness value channels for conditional controllers.
Routed catalog storefront preserves boolean truthiness inputs for conditional controllers.
Routed catalog storefront has switch owner value-channel typing.
Routed catalog storefront preserves availability enum inputs for switch controllers.
Routed catalog storefront has promise owner value-channel typing.
Routed catalog storefront preserves promise inputs for promise controllers.
Routed catalog storefront has fulfilled promise branch value-channel typing.
Routed catalog storefront unwraps fulfilled promise branch values into template scope.
Routed catalog storefront exposes items collection getter dependency rows.
Routed catalog storefront exposes plain selection count getter observation.
Routed catalog storefront components call the DI-owned state layer.
Routed catalog storefront state calls the injected service boundary.
Routed catalog storefront root binds DI-owned state projections directly.
Routed catalog storefront card binds directly to entity presentation getters.
Routed catalog storefront card observed dependencies mark entity getter reads as accessors.
Routed catalog storefront exposes plain Item getter observation.
Routed catalog storefront card disabled binding reads entity stock directly.
Routed catalog storefront detail route adapts the route parameter into a template-local item.
Routed catalog storefront detail disabled binding reads entity stock directly.
Routed catalog storefront has no open semantic seams.
